overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a desert outpost past a customized rally car and NPCs, then trekking across the Badlands toward Night City along concrete channels during a golden sunset.

events.description: turning left to move past the customized rally car
moving away from the workshop building toward the open area with NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking past the customized rally car and approaching a group of NPCs near a parked sedan

notable_agents.action: customized Quadra Type-66 rally car with Shout & Ride livery parked by the building
group of NPCs gathered near a parked sedan with headlights on

entered.detail: brown industrial building with teal accents and square windows
heavily modified Quadra Type-66 with racing livery and off-road tires
futuristic skyscrapers of Night City visible on the horizon
dark sedan with headlights on parked near the NPC group

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a desert outpost beside an industrial workshop building. A customized rally car with distinctive Shout & Ride livery sits prominently near the building. The camera moves past the vehicle toward a group of NPCs gathered near a parked sedan, with the distant Night City skyline visible against the sunset.

events.description: navigating around NPCs standing in the path
leaving the outpost area behind and entering empty desert

agents.ego_description: walking past the last NPCs and leaving the outpost behind, heading into the open wasteland

notable_agents.action: NPC in red jacket standing directly in the path
NPC in white jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: scattered desert shrubs and dry grasses
metal railway tracks leading toward the city

segments.scene_description: Leaving the outpost behind, the camera moves through the last scattered NPCs and enters the open Badlands. Sparse desert vegetation dots the landscape while railway tracks become visible in the distance, pointing toward the glowing Night City skyline that grows larger on the horizon.

events.description: smoke plume from burning structure becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: trekking across the open desert toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: dark smoke rising from a burning structure near the city
derelict buildings and ruins scattered in the wasteland

segments.scene_description: Now in the empty wasteland, the camera continues toward Night City with no other people in sight. A dark smoke plume rises from a burning structure near the city, becoming visible against the sunset sky. Abandoned ruins dot the right side of the landscape as the railway tracks draw closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert wasteland with concrete aqueduct channels

events.description: stepping onto the concrete aqueduct structure
slight turn to follow the curve of the concrete channels

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete irrigation channels toward Night City

entered.detail: raised concrete irrigation channels with parallel paths stretching toward the city

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions to raised concrete aqueduct channels which the camera follows toward Night City. The burning smoke plume grows larger and more defined ahead, while the massive city skyline dominates the left horizon. The concrete structure provides a clear path through the otherwise empty desert wasteland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling desert outpost into the desolate expanse of the Badlands, culminating in a trek toward the towering skyline of Night City. It begins beside an industrial workshop and a customized rally car, moving past gathered NPCs as the distant city first appears against a sunset sky. As the camera leaves the outpost behind, the environment shifts into an open wasteland of sparse vegetation and distant railway tracks that draw the viewer deeper into the desert. The scene then opens further into the empty wilderness, where abandoned ruins dot the landscape and a dark plume of smoke rises from a burning structure ahead. Finally, the terrain transitions into raised concrete aqueduct channels, providing a structured path that leads directly toward the massive, dominating skyline of the city.
